#  View Purchase Orders and Subcontracts (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To view purchase orders or subcontracts NOT marked Private_ , 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Commitments tool.
    * _To view purchase orders or subcontracts marked Private_ :
      * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool.   
OR  
'Read Only' or 'Standard' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool and you must be a member of the 'Private' list on the commitment.   
OR  
'Read Only' or 'Standard' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool with the ['View Private Work Order Contract' granular permission](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/tutorials/grant-granular-permissions-in-a-project-permissions-template) and/or ['View Private Purchase Order Contract' granular ](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/tutorials/grant-granular-permissions-in-a-project-permissions-template)[permission](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/tutorials/grant-granular-permissions-in-a-project-permissions-template) enabled on the permission template. This permission allows you to view the Change Orders tab on the subcontract.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * This item can be viewed or edited offline if it was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device. Tasks performed in offline mode sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create a Purchase Order (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-ios/tutorials/create-a-purchase-order-ios) or [Create a Subcontract](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/create-a-subcontract)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to your project's **Commitments** tool using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap **Purchase Orders** or **Subcontracts**.
  3. Tap the item you want to view.
  4. To view a commitment's Schedule of Values (SOV):
    1. Tap the commitment containing the schedule of values you want to view.
    2. Tap **Schedule of Values**.
    3. Tap a line item to view its details.


## See Also
  * [View Inclusions and Exclusions for Subcontracts (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-ios/tutorials/view-inclusions-exclusions-for-subcontracts-ios)
  * [View Change Orders (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-ios/tutorials/view-change-orders-ios)
  * [Which Procore tools support Work Breakdown Structure?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-tools-support-work-breakdown-structure)
title: View Purchase Orders and Subcontracts (iOS)
description: How to view purchase orders and subcontracts using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
